title: Verify form-scoped error banner is distinct from field-level errors

steps.expected: A form displays with required fields and a Submit button

steps.action: Enter invalid values into multiple fields and click Submit
steps.expected: A form-scoped error banner appears above the form summarizing the submission failure

steps.action: Observe the form-scoped banner and the per-field inline errors simultaneously
steps.expected: The banner is distinct from the field-level errors; both sets of messages are present
